Registry / Terms / validation

validation

VIMFull match — VIM 2012 G 18 #00176 · 3 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 2012 Latest · concept #2.45view ↗

{{2.44,verification}}, where the specified requirements are adequate for an intended use

  • VIM 2012 · #2.45
    {{2.44,verification}}, where the specified requirements are adequate for an intended use

Suggested actions

  1. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

2 distinct definitions across 3 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
confirmation, through the provision of objective evidence, that the requirements for a specific intended use or application have been fulfilled [ISO 9000:2000, 3.8.5]
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102001OIML D 27:20012.1400176pending
202X2001OIML D 27:20012.1400176pending

1 unique definition (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102008OIML D 31:20083.1.5602223
confirmation by examination and provision of objective evidence (i.e. information that can be proved true, based on facts 4: obtained from observations, measurement, test, etc.) that the particular requirements for the specific intended use are fulfilled. In the present case the related requirements are those of this Document
pending
